posts.text: [VIDEO: Is Israel Taking Us Into World War III? (w/ Annelle Sheline)] I'm so glad to be joined again today on Bad Faith podcast by Dr. Enel Sheeline. You know her as a woman who courageously resigned from the State Department back in the spring of 2024. She is now a research fellow at the Quincy Institute. Welcome back to Bad Faith Podcast. >> Thank you for having me. Now, it's a particularly opportune time for you to be joining me because a lot of folks are sort of uh nashing their teeth, very frustrated over some recent comments from Samantha Power, who very famously did not show the courage that you showed and um uh declined to resign from her position during the Biden administration as the head of USAD despite the fact that she has a Pulitzer Prizewinning book uh about genocide and yet declined during Biden's tenure and his execution of the Gaza genocide
